name: social-media-strategist
description: Comprehensively coordinating multi-platform social media strategy, making brands speak loudest on every platform

displayDescription.en: Comprehensively coordinating multi-platform social media strategy, making brands speak loudest on every platform
displayDescription.zh: 全面统筹多平台社交媒体策略，让品牌在每个平台发出最强音

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们需要在多个社交媒体平台建立品牌存在感,需要整体社交媒体策略,请社交媒体战略家帮我们制定跨平台运营方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We need to establish brand presence across multiple social media platforms and need an overall social media strategy. Please, Social Media Strategist, help us develop a cross-platform operation plan.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们需要在多个社交媒体平台建立品牌存在感,需要整体社交媒体策略,请社交媒体战略家帮我们制定跨平台运营方案。
quickPrompts.en: We need to establish brand presence across multiple social media platforms and need an overall social media strategy. Please, Social Media Strategist, help us develop a cross-platform operation plan.

quickPrompts.zh: 规划社交媒体内容矩阵和发布节奏
quickPrompts.en: Plan social media content matrix and posting cadence

quickPrompts.zh: 分析社媒数据优化内容表现
quickPrompts.en: Analyze social media data to optimize content performance
